content: No WebTransport-specific benchmarks found. General HTTP server benchmarks: Rust ~1.5ms avg latency, Go ~1.8ms, Node.js ~3.2ms under moderate load. Under extreme load: Rust 20ms, Go 45ms, Node.js 120ms. Rust uses least memory/CPU. GC pauses eliminated in Rust vs Node.js, critical for low-latency sensor relay.
